programs.title: MBA in Canada
programs.description: Career-focused MBA pathways in top Canadian business schools.

programs.title: MS in Australia
programs.description: Industry-aligned postgraduate programs with strong internship options.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
destinations.description: The UK is home to some of the world's most prestigious universities, offering world-class education, a rich cultural experience, and strong graduate outcomes.
destinations.overview: The UK combines globally respected degrees, shorter course durations, and strong links to industry. Students benefit from a rich academic culture, international campuses, and practical graduate routes.
highlights: Post-Study Work Visa up to 2 years

destinations.name: United States
destinations.description: The USA offers unmatched academic resources, research funding, flexible course choices, and career opportunities at globally recognized institutions.
destinations.overview: The USA offers unparalleled academic resources, research funding, and career opportunities at globally recognized institutions. International students benefit from vibrant campus life and extensive alumni networks.

destinations.name: Canada
destinations.description: Canada is a leading destination for international students thanks to welcoming immigration pathways, high quality of life, and practical work options.
destinations.overview: Canada is known for safe cities, welcoming policies, respected universities, and strong post-study pathways. It is a practical option for students planning long-term settlement.
highlights: Post-Graduation Work Permit up to 3 years

destinations.name: Australia
destinations.description: Australia combines globally respected universities with industry-linked education, excellent lifestyle, and practical post-study work routes.
destinations.overview: Australia offers career-oriented degrees, vibrant student cities, and strong graduate work opportunities. It is especially popular for business, technology, healthcare, and research pathways.

destinations.name: Europe
destinations.description: Europe offers diverse English-taught programs, affordable tuition, cross-border mobility, and strong options across business, technology, and research.
destinations.overview: Europe gives students access to affordable public education, English-taught degrees, strong research hubs, and a rich cross-cultural academic experience.

destinations.name: New Zealand
destinations.description: New Zealand is ideal for students who want focused universities, safety, work opportunities, and a calm environment for long-term growth.
destinations.overview: New Zealand offers a safe study environment, research-led universities, and a balanced lifestyle. It suits students looking for focused programs and stable post-study options.

siteContent.heroSubtitle: NextStep Global is a reliable student service provider committed to guiding ambitious learners, strengthening their education portfolio, and unlocking worldwide opportunities.
siteContent.mentorshipSubtitle: We guide students through admissions, scholarship planning, visa preparation, and financial documentation with practical support at every step.

services.title: College & University Admission
services.text: College and university admission processes are simplified with expert guidance.

services.title: Scholarship Assistance
services.text: Scholarship assistance helps students identify financial support for international education.

services.title: Financial Documentation Guidance
services.text: Financial documentation guidance helps students prepare proper records for admission and visa processing.

services.title: Career Counselling
services.text: Education counsellors learn about student goals and recommend practical academic pathways.

services.title: Visa Services
services.text: Visa services support students with processing, documentation, and interview readiness.

services.title: Test Preparation Classes
services.text: Test preparation classes help improve exam confidence and readiness.

siteContent.aboutText: NextStep Global is a London-based education consultancy dedicated to linking international students with prestigious global universities, offering expertise across law, medicine, business, and other academic fields.
siteContent.contactTitle: Have Any Questions About Studying Abroad?
siteContent.contactText: Contact us today for admission guidance, destination selection, and visa preparation support.
siteContent.footerTagline: NextStep Global is a London-based education consultancy dedicated to linking international students with prestigious global universities.

ownerSettings.defaultCounselorMessage: Thank you for your inquiry. A counselor will reach out soon.
ownerSettings.brandTagline: Study abroad planning with structure, care, and momentum.

notificationTemplates.name: Welcome Follow Up
notificationTemplates.subject: Your NextStep consultation request
notificationTemplates.message:
Hi {{name}},

Thank you for reaching out. Our team will review your goals and contact you shortly.

Regards,
NextStep

notificationTemplates.name: Document Reminder
notificationTemplates.subject: Document checklist reminder
notificationTemplates.message:
Hi {{name}},

This is a reminder to upload your pending documents so we can continue your application process.

consultants.name: Priya Sharma
consultants.bio: Priya helps students match their academic profile with Canadian universities, scholarship options, and post-study pathways.

consultants.name: Rahul Mehta
consultants.bio: Rahul focuses on practical course shortlisting, documentation readiness, and student visa interview preparation.

consultants.name: Dr. Ananya Krishnan
consultants.bio: Ananya guides postgraduate and research applicants through university fit, statements of purpose, and supervisor outreach.
